title: Van Vihar National Park
tagline: Van Vihar National Park — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Van Vihar National Park, Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Van Vihar National Park is a national park in Bhopal, the capital city of Madhya Pradesh in central India.
overview.description: Van Vihar National Park is a national park in Bhopal, the capital city of Madhya Pradesh in central India. Declared a national park in 1979, it covers an area of about 4.45 km2. It has the status of a national park, but is developed and managed as a modern zoological park, following the guidelines of the Central Zoo Authority. Animals are kept in near natural habitats.

topPlaces.name: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Manav Sangrahalaya
topPlaces.description: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Manav Sangrahalaya also referred to as the National Museum of Humankind, or Museum of Man and Culture is a museum located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. The museum spreads over an area of about 200 acres on the Shymala Hills in the city.

topPlaces.name: Tribal Museum Bhopal
topPlaces.description: The Tribal Museum of Bhopal or Madhya Pradesh Tribal Museum is located close to the State Museum, Bhopal, near the Museum of Man/ Museum of Mankind in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. This is a museum dedicated to the living aspects of tribal life, indigenous knowledge systems, and aesthetics.

topPlaces.name: Bhadbhada Dam
topPlaces.description: The Bhadbhada dam is a set of 11 sluice gates at the south-east corner of Upper lake in Bhopal. It was constructed in 1965.

topPlaces.name: State Museum, Bhopal
topPlaces.description: The State Museum Bhopal is located on Shymala Hills, in Bhopal, the capital city of the state of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is popular for its design and the breadth of its inventory of art and cultural artefacts.

topPlaces.name: Bharat Bhavan
topPlaces.description: Bharat Bhavan is an autonomous multi-arts complex and museum in Bhopal, India, established and funded by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. The architect of the Bharat Bhavan is Charles Correa.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Bhopal
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (Hindi: राज भवन, translation: Government House) is the official residence of the governor of Madhya Pradesh Mangubhai Patel. It is located in the capital city of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Bhojtal
topPlaces.description: Bhojtal, also known as Upper Lake, is a large lake which lies on the western side of the capital city of Madhya Pradesh, Bhopal, India. It is a major source of drinking water for the residents of the city, serving around 40% of the residents with nearly 30 million imperial gallons (140,000 m3) of water per day.

topPlaces.name: Bhoj Wetland
topPlaces.description: The Bhoj Wetland consists of two lakes located in the city of Bhopal, the capital of the central Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. The two lakes are the Bhojtal (Upper Lake) & the Lower Lake, which lie to the west of the city center.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Manav Sangrahalaya & around

items.note: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Manav Sangrahalaya also referred to as the National Museum of Humankind, or Museum of Man and Culture is a museum located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. The museum spreads over an area of about 200 acres on the Shymala Hills in the city.

The Tribal Museum of Bhopal or Madhya Pradesh Tribal Museum is located close to the State Museum, Bhopal, near the Museum of Man/ Museum of Mankind in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. This is a museum dedicated to the living aspects of tribal life, indigenous knowledge systems, and aesthetics.
The Bhadbhada dam is a set of 11 sluice gates at the south-east corner of Upper lake in Bhopal. It was constructed in 1965.

The State Museum Bhopal is located on Shymala Hills, in Bhopal, the capital city of the state of Madhya Pradesh in India. It is popular for its design and the breadth of its inventory of art and cultural artefacts.
Bharat Bhavan is an autonomous multi-arts complex and museum in Bhopal, India, established and funded by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. The architect of the Bharat Bhavan is Charles Correa.

Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (Hindi: राज भवन, translation: Government House) is the official residence of the governor of Madhya Pradesh Mangubhai Patel. It is located in the capital city of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

Bhojtal, also known as Upper Lake, is a large lake which lies on the western side of the capital city of Madhya Pradesh, Bhopal, India. It is a major source of drinking water for the residents of the city, serving around 40% of the residents with nearly 30 million imperial gallons (140,000 m3) of water per day.

The Bhoj Wetland consists of two lakes located in the city of Bhopal, the capital of the central Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. The two lakes are the Bhojtal (Upper Lake) & the Lower Lake, which lie to the west of the city center.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Van Vihar National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Van Vihar National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Van Vihar National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Van Vihar National Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Van Vihar National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Van Vihar National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Van Vihar National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Van Vihar National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Manav Sangrahalaya, Tribal Museum Bhopal, Bhadbhada Dam, State Museum, Bhopal, Bharat Bhavan.
